commit.message:
Implement B6 MPN Variant Prioritization

New module: mpn_variants.py
- Parse MPNs to extract base part and suffixes
- Classify suffixes: packaging, compliance, temp, auto, mil
- Determine match type: EXACT, PACKAGING_SAFE, PACKAGING_MISMATCH, COMPLIANCE, SPEC
- Bidirectional packaging logic (T&R safe when not specified, harder sell when specified)

Updated batch_rfqs_from_system.py:
- Extract offered MPN from search results (column 0)
- Calculate match type for each supplier
- Include match type in output Excel (new columns: Offered MPN, Match Type, Variant Flags)
- Color-code risky match types (COMPLIANCE=red, SPEC=orange, PACKAGING_MISMATCH=yellow)

Updated config.py:
- Incorporate match type into supplier priority scoring
- EXACT matches rank highest, followed by PACKAGING_SAFE
- COMPLIANCE/SPEC variants rank lower but still included

Example: Customer requests NUP2105L
- NUP2105L -> EXACT (green)
- NUP2105LT1 -> PACKAGING_SAFE (T&R ok when not specified)
- NUP2105LT1G -> COMPLIANCE (flag - RoHS variant may not be acceptable)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Set epitope defaults to norm partition with 500G and cap cluster workers

Config was overriding SLURM script to short partition (256GB max),
causing OOM with fork-based clustering. Default to norm (2TB nodes)
with 500G allocation. Cap default cluster workers to 4 to limit
copy-on-write memory from forked processes.

commit.message:
Add SIDM extensions: velocity-dependent σ(v), timestep constraint, anisotropic scattering, iSIDM

Four extensions to the SIDM Monte Carlo scattering module:

1. Velocity-dependent cross-section (sidm_type):
   - 'yukawa': σ/m = σ₀/(1+(v/v₀)²)² for Yukawa-like potentials
   - 'power_law': σ/m = σ₀(v/v₀)^n with cap at 10⁴σ₀

2. Timestep constraint (sidm_courant):
   - Track P_max per level, constrain dt in newdt_fine
   - dt_new ≤ C_SIDM/P_max × dt_old (default C=0.1)

3. Anisotropic scattering (sidm_angular='rutherford'):
   - dσ/dΩ ∝ 1/(1-cosθ+2ε)² with CDF inversion sampling
   - Lab-frame rotation via orthonormal basis construction

4. Inelastic scattering (sidm_inelastic):
   - Ground/excited states tracked via tp field (0/-1)
   - g+g→e+e (endothermic, threshold KE>2δ), e+e→g+g (exothermic)
   - Restart-safe initialization of excited fraction

commit.message:
Fix packing slip to use actual shipment records instead of live FIFO

After a shipment was committed, the packing slip endpoint was
recalculating FIFO against current (post-shipment) inventory, causing
it to show less than what was actually shipped. Now checks for
committed shipment records in the shipments table and pulls lot-level
data from shipment_lines → transaction_lines → lots. Falls back to
the original FIFO preview for unshipped orders (pick-list use case).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add SAR-based rig detection backtest with 6-month validation

Sentinel-1 C-band SAR (VV polarization) detects drilling rigs via radar
double-bounce from vertical metal masts. Key finding: SAR delta_contrast
(change in center-vs-background VV backscatter) achieves F1=0.55 aggregate
across Jul-Dec 2025 vs F1=0.39 for optical brightness alone. Best single
month: Dec 2025 at F1=0.75 (100% precision, 60% recall at >=15dB).

- src/backtest.py: Optical brightness backtest with pad clustering
- src/sar_test.py: Initial SAR vs optical comparison (15 active/inactive pads)
- src/sar_backtest.py: Single-month SAR threshold sweep
- src/sar_variations.py: Window size + SAR+optical combination experiments
- src/sar_backtest_6m.py: Full 6-month SAR backtest with aggregate scoring
- SWIR bands (B11/B12) tested and found non-discriminative at 20m resolution

  * Atomic checkout SQL (anti-double-work au niveau data plane)
  * Budget hard stop automatique (SQL atomique, pause agent)
  * Goal ancestry — chaîne Mission→Goal→Project→Task injectée
  * Session persistence entre heartbeats (sessionIdBefore/After)
  * Config versioning + rollback (agent_config_revisions)
  * Audit log immuable + runId tracing sur chaque action
  * Skill injection via --add-dir (propre, scopé)
  * PARA memory skill (summary.md + items.yaml, facts jamais supprimés)
  * Vigilance Clipmart (même pattern OpenClaw/Cisco)
  * 6 extractions concrètes pour LCARS

- insights-ecosysteme-final.md : mise à jour
  * Paperclip dans la cartographie comparative
  * Section §4 dédiée (patterns, implications LCARS)
  * Renumérotation des sections
  * Boucle vertueuse : 3 couches (Paperclip/TeammateTool/LCARS)
  * Recommandations §11-12 ajoutées

Fix redirect loop: remove www→bare domain redirect that conflicted with Vercel

Vercel handles thejre.org → www.thejre.org. The app was also redirecting
www.thejre.org → thejre.org, causing an infinite redirect loop. Removed the
conflicting rule; Vercel is now the sole authority on domain canonicalization.

commit.message:
Add PR preview deployments via gh-pages subpath (#37)

- Rewrite deploy.yml: push to gh-pages branch instead of artifact API,
  preserving pr-* subdirectories on each main deploy
- Add pr-preview.yml: on PR open/sync, copy site to gh-pages/pr-{N}/ and
  comment the preview URL; on PR close, remove the directory and comment
- Both workflows share concurrency group 'gh-pages' to prevent push conflicts

After merging, switch Pages source in repo Settings → Pages → Source from
"GitHub Actions" to "Deploy from a branch" (branch: gh-pages, folder: /).

commit.message:
Generate compilable class template in read_badi_definition + fix search guidance

Root cause of "Parameter method could not be found": BADi interface
IF_EX_BADI_SD_SALES has 30+ CHANGING parameters per method. The agent
cannot correctly reproduce these from memory, causing syntax errors.

Key fix: read_badi_definition now generates a classTemplate field — a
pre-built compilable class skeleton with empty METHOD stubs for every
interface method. The agent only needs to:
1. Rename the class
2. Add business logic inside ONE method
3. Leave other methods as empty stubs (they compile correctly)

This eliminates:
- Wrong method names
- Wrong parameter names/types (inherited from interface, not redeclared)
- Missing methods
- Comments between methods

Also fixed prompt:
- Search with BADi name patterns (*BADI_SD*) not business terms (*SALES_ORDER*)
- Start from classTemplate instead of writing class from scratch
- No private helper methods — all logic in interface methods
- Max 5 tool calls for entire BADi workflow

Fix listing cards showing 'Closed' everywhere and broken street view images

- Fix case sensitivity bug in OpenStatusBadge: DB stores lowercase day keys
  (e.g. 'thursday') but getTodayKey() returned 'Thursday', causing every
  listing to show as 'Closed'
- Only show 'Open Now' on listing cards (positive signal), hide 'Closed'
  status to avoid making the site look full of dead businesses
- Remove street_view_url fallback from listing cards since the Street View
  API returns 403 errors, causing broken image icons

commit.message:
Use torch.compile on full model for training only, fix eval compatibility

- Remove per-method @torch.compile decorators from FinalLayer, DinoFinalLayer, JiTBlock
- Compile the full DDP model and use it only during training
- Eval uses uncompiled model_without_ddp to avoid dynamic-shape/ODE solver issues
- Remove TORCHDYNAMO_DISABLE=1 from sbatch so compilation actually runs
- Increase num_workers from 2 to 12 to reduce data loading stalls
